content_fingerprint: zilliz releases claude context v0 1 10 zilliz has tagged v0 1 10 of its claude context repository a relatively early stage release from the vector database company best known for the milvus open source project zilliz shipped version v0 1 10 of the claude context repository under the zilliztech github organization on april 27 2026 no release notes or changelog were visible in the source page captured for this brief zilliz is the company behind milvus a widely used open source vector database and by extension the managed zilliz cloud service the claude context repository suggests integration or
